programmes.show_description: Psychology student Alesia is tired of dating 'boys' and hopes to meet a real man in the buff. And after 200 dates all over the world, Louise is ready to meet her soulmate.
The Goggleboxers have been watching The Crown, Survivor, 007: Road to a Million, The Good Ship Murder and Shoplifters: Caught Red Handed.
It's a Wonderful Life: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoff is excited to join in - despite Erica's reservations.
Pickleball: Under pressure to beef up his CV, Adam tries out for William Penn's pickleball team. Beverly's determined to give Murray an epic birthday bash.
Game Night: When he befriends the most popular girl in school, Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice.
Back in 2014, Jack was hoping to plan a theatrical big day for groom James. Was it A Midsummer Night's Dream? Or did it turn out to be a Comedy of Errors? (Ep20)
Penultimate Challenge: The teams build something to replace a horse on a carousel at Luna Park amusement park. The builds must survive on the rotating carousel.
Cheeky clips from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans.
Brand new series: In India's city of love, Agra, the remaining racers battle exhaustion, extreme heat and even a monsoon. But will learning a Bollywood dance be a step too far?
Brand new series: Does Jazz have feelings for Inga? Jules and Tristan are furious with Chuggs. Freddy's back in Beks' bad books. Alice and Sam Vanderpump throw their baby shower.
Lela's: In California, Gordon Ramsay visits Lela's, a fine dining restaurant run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. Can Gordon save them from complete disaster?
Brand new series: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.
Brand new series: The brides are torn over Stella and Brook's fallout. And the start of Intimacy Week spells disaster for a bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.
for Stand Up To Cancer: Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson recreate the weirdest places that they've ever slept, in cake form!
(1995) Tom Hanks and Tim Allen star in the trailblazing, Oscar-winning family animation about toys that come to life and get into all kinds of scrapes when their kid's not looking.
Lisa's Sax: The family recall the story of when Lisa got her saxophone. It all started when the school psychologist told Marge and Homer that her talent needed to be nurtured...
Bart Star: Homer takes over as the manager of Bart's American football team after forcing Ned to quit the position. Guest starring Mike Judge as Hank Hill.
The Cartridge Family: Marge and Lisa are horrified when Homer buys a gun. And when Bart and Milhouse find it in the fridge, Marge takes the kids to live in a motel.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
This time, the celebs watch: Love Island, Shania Twain at Glastonbury, The Nevermets, The Yorkshire Vet, This Morning (Cuddle Therapy) and ITV News (Biden v Trump).
The series continues with Stranger Things, Strictly, Celebrity Scam Interceptors, Malice, Songs of Praise, CBeebies Bedtime Stories and Animals on Drugs.
This time the Goggleboxers watch: Strictly, Changing Ends, One Shot with Ed Sheeran, All Her Fault, The Marvellous Miniature Workshop and Sara Davies' Christmas Craft Off.
Self-confessed nerd and Star Wars fan Lachlan returns. Is his date with Becca out of this world? Young professionals Louisa and Cameron take time out from working life for a date.
Bisexual Jo embarks on her first ever date with a woman - 4' 7" personal trainer Naomi. And Dean, who dreams of 'a lady kissed by fire', meets flame-haired estate agent Kate.
The series continues with Stranger Things, Strictly, Celebrity Scam Interceptors, Malice, Songs of Praise, CBeebies Bedtime Stories and Animals on Drugs.
This time the Goggleboxers watch: Strictly, Changing Ends, One Shot with Ed Sheeran, All Her Fault, The Marvellous Miniature Workshop and Sara Davies' Christmas Craft Off.
Lela's: In California, Gordon Ramsay visits Lela's, a fine dining restaurant run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. Can Gordon save them from complete disaster?
Mercedes wants to know what Jenson's up to. Warren makes a decision, but is he too late? Friends support Diane and Tony. And Rex experiments with his image for the first time in public.
The Last Halloween: Phil's determined to scare Claire on Halloween. And for the first time, Gloria is self-conscious about her age when someone correctly assumes she's Jay's wife.
A Game of Chicken: Gloria tries to secretly baptise the twins before Haley and Dylan get home. Cam is at war with his school's mascot. Claire deals with the closet fiasco fallout.
The Last Thanksgiving: Cameron and Mitchell's friends mistakenly assume they've split up - and they've definitely chosen a side. And Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner.
The Last Christmas: Cameron hopes to keep everyone happy for Christmas dinner, but Mitchell thinks he has an ulterior motive. Meanwhile, Claire tries to dodge Jay's job offer.
Sebastian's: Gordon Ramsay visits Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Los Angeles. The customers are scarce and the debt is mounting. Can Gordon turn the restaurant's fortunes around?
Finn McCool's: Gordon Ramsay visits Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, where the family feuding has got out of hand. Can Gordon mediate?
The Olde Stone Mill: Gordon Ramsay visits The Olde Stone Mill in Tuckahoe, New York. The restaurant has been restored, but owner Dean can't get customers through the door.
Brand new series: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one relationship threatens to implode, and a bride makes a decision that breaks her groom's heart.
Brand new series: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages.
The Two Mrs Nahasapeemapetilons: Marge agrees to pretend to be Apu's wife when his mother visits to set up his arranged marriage, and Homer moves into the Retirement Castle.
The Dad Who Knew Too Little: Homer hires a detective to spy on Lisa so he can get to know her better. But when Homer doesn't pay him, the detective frames Lisa for a crime.
Lisa the Skeptic: During a school archaeological dig, Lisa finds the skeleton of an angel on the site where a new shopping mall is to be built.
Realty Bites: Marge takes a job with Lionel Hutz's estate agency, but begins to question her morals when she has to try to sell the infamous Murder House to Ned Flanders.
Miracle on Evergreen Terrace: When Bart destroys the family's Christmas tree and presents, his lies about a burglar stealing them spiral out of control.
All Singing, All Dancing: The Simpsons remember all the great songs from their eventful lives after renting the movie Paint Your Wagon. With the guest voice of George Harrison.
Bart Carny: Homer and Bart start working at the fairground, but because of Homer's stupidity, a fair worker and his son lose their jobs. So they steal the Simpsons' house.
Brand new series: In Kerala, the teams tackle tiger stripes, stick strikes and tuk-tuks, before tucking into a bounty of bananas! But a careless mistake could cost one duo dearly.
The Longest Marge: Somehow, Marge and Mr Burns end up co-parenting the Springfield Atoms' new wayward star quarterback.
Pixelated and Afraid: Homer and Marge's romantic getaway gets all Bear Grylls when they end up stranded in a sprawling forest being stalked by a wolverine.
(2014) Comedy sequel. The lads visit Jay in Australia after he tells them he's living a life of hedonism and sexual promiscuity as a superstar DJ.
First Day: Smash hit comedy about four teenagers. Will (Simon Bird), whose parents have divorced, must move to a new area and change from private to comprehensive school.
Bunk Off: Will, Simon, Jay and Neil bunk off school. They go to Neil's house to get drunk, and Simon has a vodka-induced romantic revelation about his childhood sweetheart Carli.
